issues.original_text: each request will be allocated less FLOPs and thus complete slower.
issues.description: The original text uses 'FLOPs' (floating-point operations, representing a compute budget/amount of work), but the translation uses 'FLOPS' (floating-point operations per second, representing a rate/throughput). This is a subtle but important distinction in hardware and AI contexts.
issues.why_it_matters: Confusing FLOPs with FLOPS changes the technical meaning from 'amount of compute allocated' to 'compute speed allocated'.
issues.suggestion: 改为：“分配给每个请求的 FLOPs 会减少，导致完成速度变慢。”

issues.description: Missing CJK-Latin spacing between '输出' and 'Token'.
issues.why_it_matters: Proper spacing improves readability and adheres to professional typesetting standards.
issues.suggestion: 改为：“每个输出 Token 的时间 (TPOT)”

issues.original_text: Each forward pass loads the entire KV cache for a sequence from HBM... making decode memory (bandwidth) intensive.
issues.description: In the context of GPUs and HBM (High Bandwidth Memory), 'memory' should be translated as '显存' rather than '内存'.
issues.why_it_matters: Using the correct domain-specific terminology is crucial for hardware engineers and GPU researchers.
issues.suggestion: 改为：“这使得解码成为显存（带宽）密集型操作。”

issues.description: The translation '（又称 PD分离 (预填充-解码分离)，或简称“分离”）' uses nested half-width parentheses inside full-width parentheses, and lacks spacing around 'PD'.
issues.why_it_matters: Nested parentheses look clunky and disrupt the reading flow.
issues.suggestion: 改为：“（又称 PD 分离即预填充-解码分离，或简称“分离”）”
